data.content: [claude-code 2026-03-19] All 3 child knots shipped. Implementation complete: (1) lease-audit persistence layer with append-only JSONL, worktree-aware discovery, retrospective success attribution (3727); (2) maxClaimsPerQueueType setting in schema/UI/OpenAPI + audit view tab in beats navigation (447e); (3) per-queue-type claim counters replacing MAX_TAKE_ITERATIONS, soft agent rotation, lease audit events on claim (6a61). 3 commits on main. All quality gates pass.
